factionAbilities.name: EDICT
factionAbilities.effect: When you win a combat, place 1 command token from your opponent's reinforcements in your fleet pool if it does not already contain 1 of that player's tokens; other player's tokens in your fleet pool increase your fleet limit but cannot be redistributed.

factionAbilities.name: IMPERIA
factionAbilities.effect: While another player's command token is in your fleet pool, you can use the ability of that player's commander, if it is unlocked.

factionAbilities.name: HUBRIS
factionAbilities.effect: During setup, purge your "Alliance" promissory note. Other players cannot give you their "Alliance" promissory note.

versions.timing: At the start of the strategy phase:
versions.effect: Choose 1 non-home system that contains your units; each other player who has a token on the Mahact player's command sheet places a token from their reinforcements in that system. Then, return this card to the Mahact player.

factionTechnologies.name: Genetic Recombination
factionTechnologies.effect: You may exhaust this card before a player casts votes; that player must cast at least 1 vote for an outcome of your choice or remove 1 token from their fleet pool and return it to their reinforcements.

infantry.name: Crimson Legionnaire
infantry.note: Mahact Infantry turn into commodities or trade goods when they are destroyed.

abilities.name: Commodity on Death
abilities.effect: After this unit is destroyed, gain 1 commodity or convert 1 of your commodities to a trade good.

abilities.name: Commodity on Death
abilities.effect: After this unit is destroyed, gain 1 commodity or convert 1 of your commodities to a trade good.

abilities.name: Respawn
abilities.effect: After this unit is destroyed, place the unit on this card. At the start of your next turn, place each unit that is on this card on a planet you control in your home system.

abilities.name: Combat Bonus vs Non-Vassal
abilities.effect: During combat against an opponent whose command token is not in your fleet pool, apply +2 to the results of this unit's combat rolls.

abilities.name: End Their Turn
abilities.effect: After a player whose command token is in your fleet pool activates this system, you may spend their token from your fleet pool to end their turn; they gain that token.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías amarillas pueden usarse como verdes para prerrequisitos, y viceversa (no ambas a la vez).

ability.name: Vaults of the Heir
ability.effect: ACTION: Exhaust this card and purge 1 of your technologies to gain 1 relic.

agent.name: Jae Mir Kan
agent.ability: When you would spend a command token during the secondary ability of a strategic action: You may exhaust this card to remove 1 of the active player's command tokens from the board and use it instead.

commander.name: Il Na Viroset
commander.unlock: Have 2 other factions' command tokens in your fleet pool.
commander.ability: During your tactical actions, you can activate systems that contain your command tokens. If you do, return both command tokens to your reinforcements and end your turn.

hero.name: Airo Shir Aur
hero.ability: "BENEDICTION" — ACTION: Move all units in the space area of any system to an adjacent system that contains a different player's ships. Space Combat is resolved in that system; neither player can retreat or resolve abilities that would move their ships. Then, purge this card.
